examples: sustancialmente similar → al menos 90% de similitud
sustancialmente todo → al menos 95% del total
generalmente ocurre → ocurre en al menos 80% de los casos
generalmente comprende → comprende en al menos 90% de las realizaciones

rules.example: el sistema puede procesar → el sistema está configurado para procesar
el módulo podría incluir → el módulo opcionalmente está configurado para incluir
puede ser implementado → se implementa como

performance_metrics: reduce latency from {baseline_ms} ms to {improved_ms} ms (at least {percentage}% reduction)
process at least {throughput} transactions per second
achieve {accuracy}% accuracy on a test set of at least {sample_size} samples
capacity_specifications: scale horizontally to at least {multiplier}× baseline capacity
timing_specifications: complete within {min_time}-{max_time} {time_unit} for at least {percentile}% of operations
respond within {max_latency} ms under load of {concurrent_requests} requests per second

required_elements_per_module: input data format (type, size range, schema)
output data format (type, size range, schema)
processing algorithm or model (name, version, parameters)
error handling strategy (retry logic, fallback, logging)

example_template.description: configured to tokenize text using byte-pair encoding with a vocabulary of at least 20,000 tokens, generate embeddings of dimension 768 using a BERT-base model with 12 layers and 12 attention heads, classify intent into one of at least 5 categories with confidence scores in range [0.0, 1.0], and output results within 500 milliseconds for input text of up to 5,000 characters

minimum_elements: what the figure depicts (type: block diagram, flowchart, sequence, etc.)
all numbered components in the figure
data flow or control flow paths
at least one example or use case illustrated by the figure

cross_reference_format.first_mention: FIG. {number} illustrates {high_level_description}, showing {component_list} and their interactions.
cross_reference_format.detailed_explanation: As shown in FIG. {number}, {component_X} ({reference_number}) {action} by {mechanism}. {Component_Y} ({reference_number}) {relationship} with {component_X}, {specific_detail}.
cross_reference_format.example: FIG. 3 illustrates a runtime sequence (300). As shown in FIG. 3, a triggering event (301) is received by the connector framework module (105), which maps it to a workflow start event. The orchestration engine module (103) creates a new workflow instance record in Redis 7.0 (step 302) and enqueues a message (step 303) for the initial node. A worker service (104) dequeues the message (step 304), executes the node logic using the NLP engine (101) or other modules, and enqueues messages for successor nodes (step 305) based on evaluated conditions.

structure: 1-2 sentences: technical field and problem addressed
2-3 sentences: key technical features and innovations
must_include: at least 3 numbered component references (e.g., module 101, engine 102)
clear statement of technical problem solved

abstract_section.template: An {invention_type} for {purpose} comprising {component_1} configured to {function_1}, {component_2} configured to {function_2}, and {component_3} configured to {function_3}. The {key_innovation} enables {technical_benefit}, achieving {metric_1} and {metric_2} compared to {baseline}. In representative deployments, the system {performance_outcome}, thereby providing {technical_advantage}.

must_include: scope of application and market context
technical limitations of prior art (with quantified metrics)
at least one complete worked example with numerical values
explanation of every figure referenced in BRIEF DESCRIPTION

latency.precision: integer for ms, one decimal for seconds
latency.example: median latency of 180 ms under load of 2,500 concurrent instances

throughput.unit: operations/requests/transactions per second or per hour
throughput.example: processes 50,000 node transitions per hour on 16 vCPU cores

accuracy.precision: one decimal for percentage, two decimals for ratio
accuracy.example: achieves 94.2% accuracy on a test set of 15,000 labeled tickets

improvement.example: reduces median latency from 420 ms to 180 ms (at least 57% reduction)

resource_specifications.storage: GB or TB (integer or one decimal)
resource_specifications.example: deployed as four Kubernetes pods, each with 4 vCPU cores and 8 GB of RAM

component_references.rule: every component mentioned in CLAIMS must be defined in DETAILED DESCRIPTION
component_references.numbering: consistent reference numbers (e.g., 101, 102) across all sections
component_references.first_use: full name with reference number in parentheses, then reference number only

performance_claims.rule: every quantified claim in SUMMARY must be supported by example in DETAILED DESCRIPTION
performance_claims.requirement: provide test conditions, sample size, and measurement method

figure_coverage.rule: every figure listed in BRIEF DESCRIPTION must be explained in DETAILED DESCRIPTION
figure_coverage.requirement: at least one paragraph (4+ sentences) per figure

capability.use: configured to, adapted to, operable to

implementation.use: comprises, includes, consists of, implemented as
implementation.avoid: may include, could comprise, might consist of

optionality.use: optionally comprises, in some embodiments, in one implementation
optionality.avoid: may optionally, could also, might additionally

sentence_structure.complex_sentences: use semicolons or split into multiple sentences
sentence_structure.technical_terms: define on first use in each major section

automated_checks.action: flag all instances of: aproximadamente, sustancialmente, generalmente, alrededor de, puede, podría
automated_checks.threshold: 0 instances allowed in CLAIMS, max 5 instances in DETAILED DESCRIPTION

automated_checks.action: verify each FIG.X in BRIEF DESCRIPTION has explanation paragraph in DETAILED DESCRIPTION
verify ABSTRACT section exists after CLAIMS
verify all performance claims include: baseline, improved value, percentage change, test conditions
verify each component in CLAIMS (101, 102, etc.) has detailed definition in DETAILED DESCRIPTION
verify independent claims include: data formats, size ranges, timing constraints, performance thresholds
automated_checks.threshold: at least 4 quantified parameters per independent claim

application_notes.deployment_instructions: Apply these rules during patent generation phase, before final review
priority_order: 1. Eliminate all vague terms in CLAIMS (CRITICAL)
2. Add technical implementation details to module descriptions (CRITICAL)
3. Complete figure explanations in DETAILED DESCRIPTION (MAJOR)
application_notes.quality_target: Achieve score ≥9.0 on evaluator scale by addressing all CRITICAL and MAJOR items
application_notes.validation: Run automated_checks before considering patent draft complete
